competitors.name: ts-run-types (schema)
competitors.source:
() =>
    createValidate(
      RT.object({
        data: RT.array(
          RT.object({
            id: RT.string(),
            name: RT.string(),
            description: RT.string(),
            price: RT.number(),
            currency: RT.union([RT.literal('USD'), RT.literal('EUR'), RT.literal('GBP')]),
            inStock: RT.boolean(),
            categories: RT.array(RT.string()),
            dimensions: RT.optional(RT.object({width: RT.number(), height: RT.number(), depth: RT.number()})),
          })
        ),
        page: RT.number(),
        pageSize: RT.number(),
        total: RT.number(),
        hasMore: RT.boolean(),
      })
    )

competitors.name: typia
typebox
zod

c(z.object({
      data: z.array(productZ),
      page: z.number(),

      total: z.number(),
      hasMore: z.boolean(),
    }))
